summary: M0 baseline + gap report delivered. Captured artifact / JSONL fanout volume, listed PostgreSQL evidence-lake gaps (pipeline_runs, source_runs, harvested_pages, evidence_seeds, evidence_cards, anchor_passages, proposal_ledger, vector_ingestion_records), confirmed vector pipeline currently outputs only event/keyword/persona records and excludes raw seeds, and produced go/no-go recommendation per milestone.

artifacts.description: Capacity baseline (4.2 GB smoke / 505 MB canonical, 8,507 + 1,479 files, 752 + 5,573 JSONL files), per-table PG coverage gap, per-record-type vector gap, milestone-level go/no-go recommendation.

nextActions: SANGUO-RAGOPS-0101: Partition artifact lake by runId/sourceId/artifactType, define retention/compression policy
SANGUO-RAGOPS-0102: Define evidence manifest + resumable scan contract
SANGUO-RAGOPS-0201: Add PostgreSQL evidence-lake schema migration
